element_scores.name: Dataset Discovery and Identification
element_scores.description: Can a user or system discover and uniquely identify this dataset?

sub_elements.name: Persistent Identifier (DOI, RRID, or URI)
sub_elements.evidence: id: https://doi.org/10.18130/V3/DXWOS5
sub_elements.quality_note: DOI present and properly formatted as persistent identifier
sub_elements.semantic_validation: DOI format valid, resolves to dataverse

sub_elements.name: Dataset Title and Description Completeness
sub_elements.evidence: title: Cell Maps for Artificial Intelligence (CM4AI); description: 23-line comprehensive description including mission, data types, methods, and outputs
sub_elements.quality_note: Both title and description are comprehensive and informative
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Description >200 chars, covers all key aspects

sub_elements.name: Keywords or Tags for Searchability
sub_elements.evidence: keywords: 25 keywords including Cell Maps, AI-Ready Data, Bridge2AI, specific cell lines, techniques (AP-MS, SEC-MS), and standards (FAIR, RO-Crate)
sub_elements.quality_note: Excellent keyword diversity covering methods, cell types, techniques, and standards

sub_elements.name: Landing Page and Resources (page, hierarchical resources)
sub_elements.evidence: page: https://www.cm4ai.org
sub_elements.quality_note: Landing page URL present; resources field not used (flat structure)

sub_elements.name: Hierarchical Structure (parent datasets, relationships)
sub_elements.evidence: No parent_datasets or related_datasets fields present
sub_elements.quality_note: Flat structure without hierarchical relationships defined

element_scores.name: Dataset Access and Retrieval
element_scores.description: Can the dataset and its associated resources be located, accessed, and downloaded?

sub_elements.name: Access Policy and IP Restrictions Defined
sub_elements.evidence: license_and_use_terms: Comprehensive CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 description with attribution requirements, commercial use restrictions, Data Access Committee oversight
sub_elements.quality_note: Detailed license terms with clear access policy and governance
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Complete license specification with attribution and commercial use terms

sub_elements.name: Regulatory Compliance and Confidentiality Classification
sub_elements.evidence: No regulatory_restrictions, confidentiality_level, hipaa_compliant, other_compliance, or governance_committee_contact fields present
sub_elements.quality_note: Missing regulatory compliance metadata despite Data Access Committee mention
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Governance mentioned in text but not structured fields

sub_elements.name: Download URL or Platform Link Available
sub_elements.evidence: No download_url field present; only DOI and page URL
sub_elements.quality_note: No direct download URL provided, access via DOI resolution

sub_elements.name: Distribution Formats and File Types Specified
sub_elements.evidence: distribution_formats: 5 formats listed (RO-Crate with provenance, MassIVE, NCBI SRA, NDEx, Dataverse) with descriptions and access_urls
sub_elements.quality_note: Multiple distribution formats comprehensively documented
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Five distinct format types with access information

sub_elements.name: Related Datasets and External Resources Linked
sub_elements.evidence: external_resources: 12 resources including project website, NIH RePORTER, Dataverse DOIs, bioRxiv publication, FAIRSCAPE, IMP, NDEx, repositories
sub_elements.quality_note: Comprehensive external resources linking to publications, tools, and repositories

element_scores.name: Data Reuse and Interoperability
element_scores.description: Is sufficient information provided to reuse and integrate the dataset with others?

sub_elements.name: License Terms Allow Reuse
sub_elements.evidence: license_and_use_terms: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 with clear reuse terms (non-commercial, attribution, share-alike)
sub_elements.quality_note: Clear permissive license allowing non-commercial reuse
sub_elements.semantic_validation: License allows reuse with attribution and sharing conditions

sub_elements.name: Data Formats Are Standardized (encoding, format)
sub_elements.evidence: No format or encoding fields present
sub_elements.quality_note: Formats described in distribution_formats but not standardized format/encoding fields

sub_elements.name: Schema or Ontology Conformance Stated
sub_elements.evidence: No conforms_to or conforms_to_schema fields present
sub_elements.quality_note: Uses ontologies (GO, Reactome, PDB, AlphaFold, Schema.org, EVI) mentioned in text but not in structured conformance fields
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Ontology usage described but not formal conformance declarations

sub_elements.name: Variable Metadata with Identifiers Defined
sub_elements.evidence: No variables field present
sub_elements.quality_note: Dataset describes protein targets and cell states but no structured variable metadata

sub_elements.name: Use Guidance Provided (intended, prohibited uses)
sub_elements.evidence: intended_uses: 6 uses including AI/ML training, VNN development, genotype-phenotype mapping; discouraged_uses: 3 uses including clinical decision-making without validation
sub_elements.quality_note: Comprehensive use guidance with both intended and discouraged uses
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Clear use case specification with 6 intended and 3 discouraged

element_scores.name: Ethical Use and Privacy Safeguards
element_scores.description: Does the dataset provide clear information about consent, privacy, and ethical oversight?

sub_elements.name: IRB or Ethics Review and Data Protection Impact
sub_elements.evidence: human_subject_research: Ethics Module (Vardit Ravitsky, Jean-Christophe Bélisle-Pipon), Data Access Committee (Jillian Parker), Bridge2AI Ethics Working Group participation
sub_elements.quality_note: Ethics review documented with named reviewers and oversight bodies; no data_protection_impacts field
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Ethics oversight present but DPIA field missing

sub_elements.name: Deidentification Method Described
sub_elements.evidence: human_subject_research: 'de-identified as they cannot be matched, with current knowledge, to a human subject'; sensitive_elements: 'De-identified commercial cell lines'
sub_elements.quality_note: Deidentification status clearly stated; no is_deidentified structured field but comprehensive text description

sub_elements.name: Privacy Protections and Re-identification Risk Assessment
sub_elements.evidence: No participant_privacy or reidentification_risk fields present
sub_elements.quality_note: Not applicable for de-identified cell lines but fields not present
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Privacy fields not applicable given data type

sub_elements.name: Informed Consent Obtained from Participants
sub_elements.evidence: No informed_consent field present
sub_elements.quality_note: Not applicable - commercially available de-identified cell lines
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Consent not applicable for commercial cell lines

sub_elements.name: Vulnerable Populations and Compensation Documented
sub_elements.evidence: human_subject_research.special_populations: MDA-MB-468 derived from 51-year-old black female (de-identified); KOLF2.1J from healthy male Northern European donor (de-identified)
sub_elements.quality_note: Population origins documented; no vulnerable_populations or participant_compensation fields (not applicable)

element_scores.name: Data Composition and Structure
element_scores.description: Can the dataset's structure, modality, and population be understood from metadata?

sub_elements.name: Cohort or Subpopulations Characteristics Described
sub_elements.evidence: subpopulations: 7 subpopulations including MDA-MB-468 (untreated, paclitaxel, vorinostat), KOLF2.1J (undifferentiated, neurons, NPCs, cardiomyocytes)
sub_elements.quality_note: Comprehensive subpopulation enumeration with treatment conditions and differentiation states

sub_elements.name: Number of Instances or Samples Reported
sub_elements.evidence: instances: 4 instances (MDA-MB-468 cell line, KOLF2.1J iPSCs, 100 chromatin regulators, 100 metabolic enzymes) with detailed descriptions
sub_elements.quality_note: Instance types clearly defined with comprehensive descriptions

sub_elements.name: Variable-Level Metadata, Tabular Flag, and Data Splits
sub_elements.evidence: No variables, is_tabular, is_data_split, or is_subpopulation fields present
sub_elements.quality_note: Missing structured variable metadata and data split information

sub_elements.name: Data Topics or Conditions Represented
sub_elements.evidence: instances and keywords describe cancer (triple negative breast cancer), neuropsychiatric disorders, cardiac disorders
sub_elements.quality_note: Disease conditions well-represented in instance descriptions

sub_elements.name: Data Quality, Anomalies, and Missing Data Documented
sub_elements.evidence: sampling_strategies: Disease-relevant cell line selection with rationale; preprocessing includes QC for imaging and mass spec data
sub_elements.quality_note: Quality control processes documented; no anomalies field but QC described
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Quality control documented in preprocessing strategies

element_scores.name: Data Provenance and Version Tracking
element_scores.description: Can a user determine dataset versions, update history, and provenance?

sub_elements.name: Dataset Version Number Provided
sub_elements.evidence: No version field present
sub_elements.quality_note: Version information in updates section (v0.5, V1.4, V2.1) but no structured version field
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Versions mentioned in text but no version field

sub_elements.name: Version Access Methods Documented
sub_elements.evidence: Updates section describes multiple DOIs for different versions: doi:10.18130/V3/B35XWX (V1.4), doi:10.18130/V3/F3TD5R (V2.1)
sub_elements.quality_note: Version access via DOIs documented in updates section; no version_access field

sub_elements.name: Change Descriptions and Errata Provided
sub_elements.evidence: updates: Comprehensive update plan with quarterly releases, specific content additions per version (perturb-seq, SEC-MS, IF images, RGB corrections, metadata fixes)
sub_elements.quality_note: Detailed change descriptions in update plan; no separate errata field

sub_elements.name: Update Schedule or Frequency Indicated
sub_elements.evidence: updates.frequency: 'Quarterly updates through November 2026; long-term preservation thereafter'
sub_elements.quality_note: Clear update schedule with quarterly releases through project end

sub_elements.name: Provenance, Source Derivation, and Raw Data Sources

sub_elements.quality_note: Provenance comprehensively described through FAIRSCAPE framework with end-to-end tracking; no was_derived_from field but provenance described
sub_elements.semantic_validation: Provenance thoroughly documented via FAIRSCAPE system

element_scores.name: Scientific Motivation and Funding Transparency

issues_detected.description: Several important metadata fields present in text but not in structured format
issues_detected.recommendation: Add structured fields for version number, software tools list, publisher, formatted citation, and standards conformance

issues_detected.description: Regulatory compliance and confidentiality classification not structured despite governance mentions
issues_detected.recommendation: Add structured governance fields including Data Access Committee contact and confidentiality level

issues_detected.description: No explicit bias documentation using standard taxonomy
issues_detected.recommendation: Document potential biases such as selection bias (specific cell lines only), population bias (limited diversity in cell line origins)

issues_detected.description: No formal social impact analysis in structured format
issues_detected.recommendation: Add future_use_impacts field with social impact analysis aligned with CROISSANT RAI standards

issues_detected.description: Dataset uses flat structure without hierarchical relationships despite multiple subsets
issues_detected.recommendation: Consider structuring subsets as hierarchical resources with typed relationships

issues_detected.description: No structured variable-level metadata despite complex multimodal data
issues_detected.recommendation: Add variable metadata for key measurements and specify tabular structure where applicable

passed: Cell line RRIDs present and valid (RRID:CVCL_0419, RRID:CVCL_B5P3)
Update plan consistent with version history
Subpopulations align with instances and collection mechanisms
Distribution formats align with external resources
warnings: Version numbers mentioned in updates but no version field
Publisher implied (UVA Dataverse, MassIVE, NCBI) but not structured
Citation recommended in license_and_use_terms but no citation field
Multiple standards mentioned but no conforms_to field
Software tools described throughout but no software_and_tools field

semantic_analysis.semantic_insights: CM4AI D4D demonstrates exceptional documentation quality with comprehensive descriptions of purposes, methods, and governance. The dataset excels in technical transparency with detailed collection mechanisms, preprocessing strategies, and quality control procedures. Provenance is thoroughly documented through the FAIRSCAPE framework with RO-Crate packaging. The Ethics Module and Data Access Committee provide robust oversight. Major strengths include multimodal integration (IF imaging, mass spectrometry, CRISPR screens), AI-readiness focus with MuSIC pipeline, and extensive external resource linkage. The main gaps are in structured metadata fields (version, publisher, citation, standards conformance) that exist in text but not as structured elements. Bias documentation and social impact analysis could be enhanced with RAI-aligned structured fields.

recommendations: Add version field with current version number (e.g., '2.1')
Add publisher field identifying primary hosting platform (e.g., 'University of Virginia LibraData (Dataverse)')
Add citation field with formatted citation string following DataCite/BibTeX format
Add conforms_to field listing standards (FAIR, RO-Crate, Schema.org, EVI, GO, Reactome)
Add software_and_tools field listing MuSIC, node2vec, HPA model, Cytoscape, FAIRSCAPE-CLI
Add format and encoding fields for primary data formats
Add regulatory_restrictions, confidentiality_level, and governance_committee_contact fields
Add known_biases field with selection bias and population bias documentation
Add future_use_impacts field with social impact analysis
Add download_url for direct data access paths
Consider restructuring subsets as hierarchical resources with parent_datasets relationships
Add variables field for key measurements (protein abundances, image features, perturbation effects)
Add is_tabular flags for tabular data components
Document anomalies field if data quality issues identified during QC
